name: BB:CategoryDefinition: Medium Magnitude Events
notes: Edit this BB to the severity, credibility, and relevance levels you wish to generate an event. The defaults are: severity (7), credibility (7), and relevance (7).
bb_references: BB:CategoryDefinition: Medium Magnitude Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
conditions_text: when the event severity is greater than 7
when the event credibility is greater than 7
when the event relevance is greater than 7
TD_list: APPLY BB:CategoryDefinition: Medium Magnitude Events on events which are detected by the LOCAL system
AND when the event severity is greater than 7
AND when the event credibility is greater than 7
AND when the event relevance is greater than 7
